title: pkg/machine: setup lingering for custom username and remove unnecessary sleep service
body:
see commits

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--

```release-note
Fixed a problem where podman machine would not have lingering enabled when a custom username was specified on init.
```
